Case Summary In Suport Of Application For Entry Of Default Judgment Against Defendant Tom Chiu
Off Calendar Aug-28-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar for a request for default judgment against Defendant Tom T. Chiu.

Dept.505; Judge: Michelle Tong; Clerk: K. Valdes; Bailiffs: Deputy Lopes; Proceedings reported by "For the Record" only to be used in compliance with California Government Code Section 69957, commencing at 10:02:08 a.m., pausing at 10:09:00 a.m., commencing at 10:12:06 a.m. pausing at 10:43:45 a.m. resuming at 11:00:27 a.m., pausing at 11:36:10 a.m., resuming at 11:53:24 a.m. and concluding at 11:55:22 a.m. (D505)

John Philip Gill, Esq. appearing for Plaintiff The Austin Owners Association.
Defendant Tom T. Chiu not appearing.
Jelani Walker, witness sworn to testify for the Plaintiff.
Megan Neider, witness sworn to testify for the Plaintiff.

Counsel to provide a summation of the case and provides proof to witness testimony.

Counsel concludes and the Court thanks counsel for the comprehensive summation.

The Court intermittently examines Witness Walker and witness Neider. Witnesses testify.

Plaintiff submits the following exhibit/s for the court's review:
Exhibit 1: Video by Witness Neider played in open court.

Counsel confirms that the requested judgment would resolve the entire action and states that the facts contained in the operative complaint is true and correct.

The Court goes off the record.

Good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff The Austin Owners Association and against the Defendant Tom T. Chiu.

Counsel is to submit a new proposed judgment to the Court for review and approval.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-02-2024 Continued To Sep-25-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
